CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, name String, data String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, name FROM remote('host{1,2}/test_table') WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE name LIKE 'A%');
WITH remote('host1{1,2}/test_table') AS data SELECT COUNT(*) FROM data GROUP BY name;
SELECT id, name FROM remote('host{1,2}{4,5}/test_table') WHERE data IN (SELECT data FROM remote('host3/test_table') WHERE id = 2);
SELECT id FROM remote('host{1,2}/test_table') WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE name = 'Alice') AND data = 'Data1';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM remote('host{1,2}/test_table') WHERE name LIKE '%li%';
